meaning: 海南(位于中国南端);n.海南(中国海南省)
examples: Hainan is not cold in winter.
Five-finger Mountain is the mountain in Hainan.
Hainan will build at least one swimming pool for each town.
Everest without oxygen, exponentially more than a national public-relations campaign budget from Harbin to Hainan.
Flights to sunny spots on southern Hainan Island have been at nearly full capacity.
